Framework:    Bash shell script
Purpose:      Installation workflow testing on external projects
Test Count:   47 test cases (all FAILING)
Execution:    bash tests/external/test-installation-workflow.sh
Exit Code:    1 (RED phase - expected failures)

Features:
  ✓ Color-coded output (RED/GREEN failures/passes)
  ✓ Automatic test project setup (Node.js + .NET)
  ✓ Utility functions for assertions
  ✓ Test counters and summary reporting
  ✓ Automatic cleanup of temporary directories
  ✓ Progress reporting with detailed assertions

  Total Tests Run:     47
  Passed:              0-4 (precondition tests)
  Failed:             43-46 (installer tests)
  Status:             ALL FAILING ❌
  Exit Code:          1

  ✓ Automatic setup/teardown with pytest

QUICK START GUIDE
================================================================================

Run Shell Tests (47 tests - all RED):
  $ bash tests/external/test-installation-workflow.sh

  Expected Output:
  - 47 tests executed
  - 0-4 tests passing (preconditions)
  - 43-46 tests failing (installer not implemented)
  - Exit code: 1

Run Python Tests (47 tests - all RED):
  $ pytest tests/external/test_install_integration.py -v

  Expected Output:
  - 47 tests executed
  - 0 tests passing
  - 47 tests failing (installer not implemented)
  - Exit code: 1

Run Both (Full Test Suite - 94+ tests):
  $ bash tests/external/test-installation-workflow.sh
  $ pytest tests/external/test_install_integration.py -v

  Status: All FAILING (installer not implemented)

  Tests: 14 (one per command: /create-context, /create-story, /dev, etc.)
  Status: All FAILING (commands require framework deployment)

✓ AC3: CLAUDE.md Merge Successful with User Content Preserved
  Tests: 3 (merge validation, framework marking, file size)
  Status: All FAILING (merge not integrated into installer)

✓ AC4: Rollback Functions Correctly (Full State Restoration)
  Tests: 3 (backup creation, rollback execution, checksum validation)
  Status: All FAILING (rollback not implemented)

✓ AC5: Installation Succeeds on .NET Test Project (Cross-Platform)
  Tests: 3 (.csproj detection, .claude/ creation, CLAUDE.md generation)
  Status: All FAILING (.NET detection not implemented)

✓ AC6: Isolation Validation (No Cross-Contamination)
  Tests: 2 (Node.js/DotNet project isolation)
  Status: Mostly PASSING (projects not created yet - but will fail in GREEN)

✓ AC7: Upgrade Workflow Tested (Fresh Install → Upgrade)
  Tests: 3 (version detection, selective update, config preservation)
  Status: All FAILING (upgrade logic not implemented)

================================================================================

✓ BR1: 100% Installation Success Required
  Tests: 2 (Node.js exit code, .NET exit code)
  Validation: Both installations must exit 0

  Tests: 1 (command success rate)
  Validation: 14/14 commands × 2 projects = 28/28

✓ BR3: CLAUDE.md Merge Must Preserve 100% User Content
  Tests: 2 (content preservation, diff validation)
  Validation: Zero user data loss

  Tests: 1 (byte-identical restoration)
  Validation: 100% checksum match

✓ BR5: Projects Must Be Isolated
  Tests: 1 (separate state validation)
  Validation: Zero cross-project contamination

WHAT'S TESTED IN EACH FILE
================================================================================

Shell Script (test-installation-workflow.sh):
  ✓ Installation workflow on real test projects
  ✓ File system operations (create, copy, merge)

  ✓ Rollback operations
  ✓ Project isolation
  ✓ Performance timing

  ✓ Integration with actual project fixtures

  ✓ Cross-platform compatibility
  ✓ Data validation

================================================================================
PHASE 2 IMPLEMENTATION CHECKLIST
================================================================================

To transition from RED to GREEN phase:

Installer Implementation:
  [ ] Create installer/install.py with external project support
  [ ] Implement tech detection (Node.js, .NET, Python)
  [ ] Deploy 450 framework files (.claude/ and .devforgeai/)
  [ ] Integrate CLAUDE.md merge (from STORY-046)
  [ ] Implement variable substitution for external context
  [ ] Create backup system before installation
  [ ] Implement rollback functionality
  [ ] Implement upgrade workflow (selective update)
  [ ] Add CLI installation (devforgeai command)
  [ ] Generate .devforgeai/.version.json

Command Testing:
  [ ] Verify all 14 commands work in external context
  [ ] Test command path resolution
  [ ] Validate skill loading from .claude/skills/
  [ ] Verify subagent invocation

Performance Optimization:
  [ ] Installation time <180 seconds
  [ ] Rollback time <45 seconds
  [ ] Upgrade time <30 seconds (vs full install)
  [ ] Progress reporting every 10%

Validation:
  [ ] CLAUDE.md merge preserves 100% user content
  [ ] Rollback restores exact pre-install state
  [ ] Projects maintain isolation (zero cross-refs)
  [ ] Installation repeatable (3 consecutive runs)
  [ ] Cross-platform parity (Node.js = .NET)

================================================================================
RUNNING THE TESTS
================================================================================

Run Shell Tests:
  $ bash tests/external/test-installation-workflow.sh

Run Python Tests:
  $ pytest tests/external/test_install_integration.py -v

Run Both:
  $ bash tests/external/test-installation-workflow.sh && \
    pytest tests/external/test_install_integration.py -v

Expected Exit Codes:
  • Shell: 1 (failure - RED phase)
  • Pytest: 1 (failure - RED phase)
  • Combined: 1 (at least one failure)

   - Check performance metrics
